title: Family
description: Build a practical family vocabulary set and learn a few useful phrases around relatives.

content.title: Immediate Family
content.description: The people most learners need first.

content.title: Vocabulary check
content.text: The first-person possessive pattern is very useful here: моя майка, моят баща, моята сестра.

content.title: Small grammar reminder
items: Many family words are easy to combine with possessive pronouns.
Pay attention to gender because Bulgarian adjectives and pronouns change with the noun.
Plural forms are useful for talking about both sides of the family.

content.title: Useful Family Phrases
content.description: Say more than just single words by using short, natural phrases.

content.note: Use 'това е' to introduce a person or thing.
This phrase is a natural conversation starter.
The clitic 'ми' often follows the noun in everyday Bulgarian.

content.title: Practice Set
content.description: Review the words in a compact study format.

content.question: What is the Bulgarian word for 'aunt'?
content.note: It is one of the most common family words in everyday speech.
